client_construction.code: db, err := sql.Open("postgres", dsn); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: Save
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, err := r.db.Exec("INSERT INTO entities(id, name) VALUES($1, $2)", entity.ID, entity.Name); return err

primary_operations.name: FindById
primary_operations.sdk_call: var e Entity; err := r.db.QueryRow("SELECT id, name FROM entities WHERE id=$1", id).Scan(&e.ID, &e.Name); return e, err

primary_operations.name: Delete
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, err := r.db.Exec("DELETE FROM entities WHERE id=$1", id); return err

code_style_notes: import lib/pq with _ blank identifier to register the driver
sql.ErrNoRows is the standard 'no row matched' sentinel
